nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Buff-bridled Inca finch
nodes.summary: Buff-bridled Inca finch（Incaspiza laeta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Buff-bridled Inca finch。

nodes.name: Buff-bridled Inca finch
nodes.summary: The buff-bridled Inca finch (Incaspiza laeta) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References

nodes.name: Incaspiza
